title: Payroll System Migration Plan
tagline: Design a migration from manual payroll to an automated system.
scenario: A 50-person company has been running payroll on Excel spreadsheets. Errors are increasing, compliance is at risk, and the CFO wants to migrate to a cloud-based payroll system (e.g., SimplePay, Sage, PaySpace). The migration must happen without missing a single payroll run.
brief: Design the complete migration plan. Cover system selection criteria, data migration, parallel running, testing, and the cutover strategy.
deliverables: System selection criteria: the 8-10 requirements the new system must meet (SA tax tables, medical aid integration, leave management, etc.)
A data migration checklist: what employee data needs to be moved and validated
A parallel running plan: how many months to run both systems side by side and the reconciliation process
A cutover checklist: the specific steps for the final switch, including rollback procedures
submissionGuidance: The biggest risk in payroll migration is paying employees incorrectly. Parallel running for 2-3 months with penny-for-penny reconciliation is essential. Show this.

rubric.label: Selection Criteria
rubric.description: Are the system requirements comprehensive and SA-specific?

rubric.label: Data Migration
rubric.description: Is the data migration plan thorough with validation steps?

rubric.label: Parallel Running
rubric.description: Is the parallel running strategy practical with clear reconciliation rules?

rubric.label: Cutover Strategy
rubric.description: Does the cutover plan include rollback procedures?
